activities_projects.title: Constructing Tangents from a Point Outside Circle
activities_projects.objective: Learn to draw tangents from an external point
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Mark a point P outside the circle
Construct tangents from P to the circle using compass and ruler
Label points of contact and tangents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands tangent construction from external point

activities_projects.title: Angle Subtended by Chord
activities_projects.objective: Explore angles subtended by a chord at the center and circumference
steps: Draw a circle with chord AB
Draw radii OA and OB
Measure angle at center and angle at circumference subtended by the chord
Observe relationship
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands angle properties of a circle
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate drawing, measurement, and observation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cyclic Quadrilateral Verification
activities_projects.objective: Verify opposite angles of a cyclic quadrilateral sum to 180°
steps: Draw a cyclic quadrilateral ABCD inside a circle
Measure opposite angles (∠A + ∠C, ∠B + ∠D)
Verify that each pair sums to 180°

activities_projects.title: Tangent Perpendicular to Radius
activities_projects.objective: Verify that tangent is perpendicular to radius at point of contact
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Draw a tangent at a point on the circumference
Draw radius to the point of contact
Measure the angle between radius and tangent

activities_projects.title: Equal Tangents from External Point
activities_projects.objective: Observe that lengths of tangents from external point are equal
steps: Draw a circle and an external point P
Draw two tangents from P to circle
Measure lengths of tangents from P to points of contact
Compare lengths

activities_projects.title: Angle in Semicircle
activities_projects.objective: Verify that angle subtended by diameter is a right angle
steps: Draw a circle with diameter AB
Choose a point C on circumference (not on diameter)
Draw triangle ABC
Measure ∠ACB and verify it is 90°
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands right angle property of semicircle

activities_projects.title: Constructing Circle with Given Chord and Angle
activities_projects.objective: Construct a circle passing through a chord making given angle at circumference
steps: Draw chord AB of given length
Use protractor to mark angle at circumference
Locate center using perpendicular bisector of chord
Draw the circle passing through chord endpoints

activities_projects.title: Observing Arcs and Sectors
activities_projects.objective: Learn to identify major and minor arcs and sectors
steps: Draw a circle and chord AB
Shade minor arc and major arc formed by AB
Draw radii to form sector corresponding to minor arc

activities_projects.title: Concentric Circles with Different Radii
activities_projects.objective: Understand concentric circles and measure radius difference
steps: Draw two concentric circles with same center but different radii
Measure the radii
Observe the distance between circles (ring width)

activities_projects.title: Circles in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: Observe and analyze circles around you
steps: Look for circular objects in home or school
Draw at least three examples
Label center, radius, and chord if applicable
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects circle concepts to real-life objects
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevant examples and correct labeling (10 marks)
